{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Fifty-Three X
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Fifty-Three X]] is a system in the [[Alliance]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"In the Alliance, they call the nearest system Fifty-Three X."<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
